title.en: Therefore, Ye Tian named it Sword Twelve.

content.en:
The Six Realms Supreme Absolute Sect created by Ye Tian was created on the basis of the Five Realms Supreme Absolute Sword Eleven, which was created by absorbing countless mysteries, and it was still a sword Supreme Absolute Sect.

Therefore, Ye Tian named it Sword Twelve.

After creating Sword Twelve, Ye Tian's body underwent some changes, and he secretly sensed the bottleneck of the rule chain that the mysterious woman said.

This chain was only when he comprehended the rules of the dimension that he could clearly perceive its existence.

"Sword Twelve, slash me!"

Ye Tian cast the Sword Twelve, spanning many dimensions, and slashed at the bottleneck of the regular chain.

Click!

The bottleneck of the regular chain is cracked and is about to break.

However, Ye Tian struck another blow and completely shattered the bottleneck of the regular chain.

As the bottleneck of the rule chain was shattered, Ye Tian found that the bottleneck in the dark no longer existed.

Thereupon.

He was once again in the depths of the Spell Spirit Gold Vein.

When the god 05 secret woman saw Ye Tian coming, she was immediately a little surprised: "You are here again, could it be that you have obtained some Yuanxia mother liquid again?"

Ye Tian shook his head and said, "Senior, I have created the Six Realms Supreme Peerless Sect and cut the bottleneck of the rule chain, so I want to continue to comprehend the rules of the dimension." "

"You've created the Six Realms Supreme Peerless Learning, so fast!"

The mysterious woman was shocked.

This efficiency is truly terrifying!

"You go to enlightenment, the stronger your strength, the more you can help me obtain the Yuanxia Mother Liquid, and try your best to comprehend the rules of the thirty-six dimensions before impacting the seventh realm, which will be good for you in the future." The mysterious woman reminded.

"Senior, don't you know what is particular or secret in this?" Ye Tian took the opportunity to ask.

The mysterious woman smiled: "Of course there are benefits, if you can't break through to the seventh realm with the rules of the thirty-six dimensions, you won't be able to become the ninth realm in the future." If you want to become the ninth realm, you must have a perfect foundation, and breaking through the seventh realm with the rules of the thirty-six dimensions will superimpose the thirty-six dimensional voids in your body, and the thirty-six dimensional voids will form a complete cycle, thus forming a dimensional domain. If you don't break through with the rules of the thirty-six dimensions, you can only form a heavy dimensional void, and if you break through to the eighth realm in the future, it will still be a dense dimensional void, and you can't form a whole. Such a structure is unstable, once it hits the ninth realm, it will definitely die, and in fact, it will be very dangerous to hit the eighth realm, but it can still break through with some treasures. It can impact the ninth realm, and after countless experiments, if it does not form a dimensional domain, it will not be able to break through successfully at all. "

"There is still such a statement!"

Ye Tian was very surprised.

This should be top secret, and the general forces should not know about it.

However, his original intention was to comprehend the rules of the thirty-six dimensions and break through.

Of course, even if other forces knew, it would be useless, and they would not pursue the comprehension of the rules of the thirty-six dimensions, because they couldn't do it at all!

They will all encounter dimensional rule chains, and if they want to rely on treasures to break the rule chains, it is almost impossible, even this mysterious woman at the peak of the eighth realm has not had a few such treasures, where can other forces get them.

As for the creation of the Six Realms Supreme Absolute Learning, this difficulty is also extremely great.

Therefore, those Sixth Realms will give up the opportunity to impact the Ninth Realm in the future and choose to directly impact the Seventh Realm.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian continued to comprehend the Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stone.

This time, he didn't have a bottleneck, and the rules of the Insight Dimension were very efficient.

Time passes.

I don't know how long it has been.

On this day, Ye Tian comprehended the rules of the twenty-seven dimensions, and his strength improved again.

He then proceeded to comprehend the rules of the dimension.

Eighteen Dimensional Rules!

Twenty-Nine Dimensional Rules!

Thirty Dimensional Rules!

However, after reaching the Thirty Dimensional Rules, the effect of the Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stone was much weaker, and it would take longer to continue to improve.

At this time, the mysterious woman began to urge: "Little guy, your strength has been improved, you can go to the Zixu River, the Zixu River is located in the twelve dimensions, I have already given you the location, with your current strength, it should not be a problem to be careful, even if you encounter some weaker seventh realm multi-dimensional life, even if you can't beat it, you can escape." Besides, your current combat power is no less than that of an ordinary Seventh Realm multidimensional life. There are not many seventh-realm multi-dimensional beings in the twelfth dimension, and the seventh-realm multi-dimensional lifeforms in Zixu River are all very weak ones, which will not threaten you, and you will not be so unlucky to encounter that kind of extremely powerful seventh-realm multidimensional life. "

"Okay, I'll go to Zixu River!"

Ye Tian saw that the mysterious woman said this, he couldn't stay here and continue to comprehend the rules of the dimension, that would definitely make the mysterious woman unhappy.

This mysterious woman is the existence of the peak of the eighth realm, and she is completely a grandfather-like golden finger, so she naturally has to use it well, so she has to have a good relationship with her.

Subsequently, Ye Tian left.

......

Ye Tian entered the twelfth dimension from another direction, and after some hurrying, he finally arrived here.

Zixu River is in the twelfth dimension, but there is still a part of it that has infiltrated into the thirteenth dimension, Ye Tian can't enter that part of the thirteenth dimension, and can only look for Yuanxia Mother River in this part of the twelfth dimension.

In terms of the area of the range, the Zixu 393 River far surpasses the Yuanmu River.

It is rumored that the Yuanmu River is a small section of the Zixu River that was cut off, and after falling into the reality dimension, it gradually turned into the Yuanmu River.

As for whether this rumor is true or not, it is not clear.

Now.

Ye Tian restrained his breath and entered the Zixu River.

"There are really a lot of sixth realm multi-dimensional beings here, they are everywhere, and there are even more sixth realm multi-dimensional lives that are more powerful than the Yuanxia mother beast. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Some of the Sixth Realm multi-dimensional beings contain powerful bloodlines, and they possess many abilities, and each of them is comparable to the Supreme Masters of the Six Realms.

Moreover, Ye Tian also sensed the breath of the seventh realm multi-dimensional life, although it was a little far away, but it proved that there were definitely a lot of seventh-realm multi-dimensional beings here.

"Slowly look for Yuanxia Mother Liquor, according to the mysterious woman, there are a lot of Yuanxia Mother Liquor here, it is not difficult to find, but Yuanxia Mother Liquid is useful for many multi-dimensional lifeforms, not necessarily all of them are occupied by Yuanxia Mother Beast, there are other powerful multi-dimensional lives, and even the seventh realm multi-dimensional life is occupied, it takes a hard battle!"

Soon.

Ye Tian found the first Yuanxia Mother Liquor, there were a lot of them, and the ones that occupied this place were some Yuanxia Mother Beasts at the peak of the Sixth Realm, and there were a large number, about sixty of them.
